positive: A stylized, symmetrical graphic of a glowing celestial compass mixed with intricate biomechanical flora. The compass needle should point towards a vibrant, stylized galaxy, and the flora elements (leaves, vines, petals) should organically wrap around the mechanism. Use deep indigo, electric teal, neon yellow, and matte black for maximum contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered, utilizing negative space elegantly. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau poster design and high-contrast digital line art, suitable for a sophisticated, streetwear-inspired apparel print. Crisp lines, clean silhouettes, highly detailed, vector graphics aesthetic.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, logo, watermark, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, noise, artifacts, photographic, photorealistic, realistic, messy, collage
